name: Creamed Tuna Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded tuna fish and medium white sauce in a bowl.
2. Heat the mixture thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
3. Serve on toast slices.
4. Sprinkle with paprika for added flavor.
5. Garnish with strips of pimento, if desired.
6. This recipe serves 6 people.
